privileged_info_summary: Task distributes project assets within a Nuxeo Platform workspace. Report name is 'Project Closure Report' (dc:title), to be moved (not copied) from source workspace '/default-domain/workspaces/Active-Projects/Project-Omega' to archive at '/default-domain/workspaces/Archives/2023'. Asset folder name is 'Reusable Assets', to be copied from source to library at '/default-domain/workspaces/Templates/Library'. The verifier checks UUID preservation (move keeps same UUID, copy creates new UUID) and location changes to determine task success. All workspace paths and document names verified against setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts.
